name: Sir Cassian Varro

aspects.high_concept: The Steel Saint of Skingrad, Great War Veteran Bounty Knight
aspects.trouble: Cannot Refuse a Duel Offered in Earnest
other_aspects: Order Is a Virtue (Even When It Hurts)

stunts: Shield Hook: +2 to Fight when Creating Advantage to off-balance or disarm with a shield.
Iron Discipline: +2 to Will when resisting intimidation, fear, or mental pressure.
Veteran Riposte: Once per scene, if Cassian succeeds with style on a Fight defense, he may immediately make a Fight attack at -1.
notes: This is where the ladder becomes serious. Cassian can be reasoned with, but only if Wayn proves honor isn't an act.
